articles.title: Experts react: How the world is responding to the US-Israeli war with Iran - Atlantic Council
articles.description: We turned to our global network to explain how leaders in Europe, Asia, and Latin America are viewing the ongoing US-Israeli war against Iran.
articles.content: The US-Israeli war against Iran has now escalated into a regional conflict, and consequences are already extending far beyond the Middle East. After asking our Mideast experts to assess the impacts o… [+16785 chars]

articles.author: Zosia Wanat
articles.title: Poland Will Eventually Seek Its Own Nuclear Weapons, Tusk Says - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Polish Prime Minister Donald Tusk signaled his country will eventually try to obtain its own nuclear weapons as Europe strengthens deterrence amid doubts over US commitment to defending the continent.
articles.content: Polish Prime Minister Donald Tusk signaled his country will eventually try to obtain its own nuclear weapons as Europe strengthens deterrence amid doubts over US commitment to defending the continent… [+261 chars]
